title: Android Developer (Kotlin)
description: Moven Mobile is a consumer fintech app with 500k downloads and a 4.8-star rating. Our entire Android codebase is Kotlin with Jetpack Compose. You'll join as the 3rd Android engineer and own the payments and savings features used by our most engaged users.
responsibilities: Build new features in Jetpack Compose for payments and savings flows
Write unit tests with JUnit5 and UI tests with Espresso/Compose Test
Collaborate with design on smooth, native-feeling animations
